# terrible_community_general_consul_policy (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The name that should be associated with the policy, this is opaque to Consul.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the policy.
- `rules` (String) Rule document that should be associated with the current policy.
- `state` (String) Whether the policy should be present or absent.
- `valid_datacenters` (String) Valid datacenters for the policy. All if list is empty.

### Read-Only

- `operation` (String) The operation performed.
- `policy` (String) The policy as returned by the Consul HTTP API.
